lenses.guidance: vv 1-7's 'Joshua was old; very much land remains' frames the partition narrative with honesty — conquest is incomplete. The structural acknowledgment makes the redemption story open-ended; possession proceeds without total completion.

vv 1-7's incomplete-conquest tension — promise given, land partially possessed — is the redemption arc's unfinished posture. The covenant keeps moving forward; complete fulfillment is not where the text leaves the reader.
